posts.text:
Americans don't seem to realize that Trump's policy - "Let Russia Win" - is slowly becoming America's policy. For more than 6 months, at his bidding, a minority in the House has blocked aid to Ukraine.


Anton Gerashchenko (@Gerashchenko_en)

Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán: Donald Trump will not be giving "a single penny" to fight Russian aggression in Ukraine. That is his idea on how to end the war.

posts.text:
Alexei Navalny was buried today on the outskirts of Moscow, two weeks after his sudden death in a Siberian prison camp.

He was mourned by thousands in the streets amid threats by the Kremlin and a massive police presence.

@nickschifrin reports.

Video

He was mourned by thousands in the streets amid threats by the Kremlin and a massive police presence.

posts.text:
Alexey Navalny’s daughter Daria pays tribute to her late father

“Dad, you were an example for many across the globe. Your optimism and contagious, sincere smile. Your curiosity and thirst for knowledge. Your incredible ability to find common ground with anyone. Your wit. Your sense of humour. Your ability to find the right words at the moment of need (or a joke to make everyone loosen up in a difficult situation). Your kindness. Your faith in the good, in yourself, in people. Since I was a kid,

posts.text:
Thank you @yulia_navalnaya for sharing this beautiful video and loving words with the world on one of the darkest days of your life.  спасибо.


Yulia Navalnaya (@yulia_navalnaya)

Лёша, спасибо тебе за 26 лет абсолютного счастья. Да, даже за три последних года счастья. За любовь, за то, что всегда поддерживал, за то, что смешил даже из тюрьмы, за то что ты обо мне всегда думал. 

Я не знаю, как жить без тебя, но я постараюсь так, чтобы ты там, наверху, радовался за меня и гордился мной. Я не зн

📹: Novaya Europe

posts.text:
There is no cavalry coming.  No miracle solution. No saviors. 

In the end, we, the American people - not any of our institutions - have to save our democracy by voting in defense of that democracy this fall. 

We are the cavalry. The responsibility is ours.

posts.text:
He "is promising to basically dismantle the American system of government." The institution that "bent the least, that has stood up the best, against his assault is the judicial branch of government. Is the rule of law. And we need to protect it" —@Maddow


Alex Wagner Tonight (@WagnerTonight)

Maddow: "My biggest takeaway from this is that we need to protect the rule of law."

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/WagnerTonight/status/1758683697862070338#m
